snapshot_metadata.note: A genuinely INDEPENDENT non-clinical pack — unlike the story_audit pack (which reuses the healthcare pack's ontology + role prompts), this pack supplies its OWN ontology, council_roles, and taxonomy with no cross-pack reuse. It is the falsification fixture for the standalone-CE claim (SPEC_STANDALONE_CORE_VALIDATION §3.1): under LITHRIM_BENCH_PACK=support_ticket_qa the FROZEN council resolves its tiers (pack_tiers), Tier-1 owner-map (pack_tier1_owners), roster identity (pack_production_judges), and lens authority (pack_lenses) entirely from THIS snapshot, with the healthcare pack unloaded and :8002 down. production_judges reuses the role NAMES of the core deployable trio (the PACK-2c OQ-2 boundary — packs subset KNOWN deployable identities; they do NOT introduce a new deployable judge). tier: core = the OSS sample tier.
